description: Use this API routine to return integer induction machine quantities. This API routine was first introduced in release 33.0.0. ierr, ival = indint(ibus, id, string)

parameters.name: string
parameters.description: String indicating the induction machine quantity desired. (input).

string.description: Machine status; 1 (one) for in-service 0 (zero) for out-of-service.
Machine standard type; 1 for NEMA 2 for IEC).
Machine design code; 0 for custom 1 through 5 for NEMA designs A through E.
Type of mechanical torque variation; 1 for a simple power law 2 for the WECC model).
Base power code; 1 for mechanical power (MW) output of the machine 2 for apparent electrical power (MVA) drawn by the machine.
Scheduled power code; 1 for mechanical power (MW) output of the machine 2 for electrical active power (MW) drawn by the machine.
Grounding impedance data input/outout (I/O) code (1 for per unit 2 for ohms).
Grounding code (0 for an ungrounded machine 1 for a grounded machine).

error_codes.description: Bus type code is not 2 or 3; ‘IVAL’ returned.
Sequence data not in case (when STRING = ‘CZG’ or ‘CGR’).
